ast.name: error
ast.source: param should be highDownDispatcher
ast.target: param 应该是 highDownDispatcher

ast.name: error
ast.source: Illegal media option. Must be like { media: [ { query: {}, option: {} } ] }
ast.target: 非法的 media 选项。必须类似 { media: [ { query: {}, option: {} } ] }

ast.name: error
ast.source: Illegal media option. Must be an array. Like { media: [ {...}, {...} ] }
ast.target: 非法的 media 选项。必须是数组。类似 { media: [ {...}, {...} ] }

ast.name: error
ast.source: `setOption` should not be called during main process.
ast.target: `setOption` 不应在主进程期间被调用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: `resize` should not be called during main process.
ast.target: `resize` 不应在主进程期间被调用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Danger: only stack dimension can be modified
ast.target: 危险：只能修改 stack 维度

ast.name: error
ast.source: For some unknown reason. drawIndex is -1
ast.target: 由于某些未知原因，drawIndex 为 -1

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid boundingCoords
ast.target: 无效的 boundingCoords

ast.name: error
ast.source: Graph nodes have duplicate name or id
ast.target: 图节点的 name 或 id 重复

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid morphing: unmatched splitted path
ast.target: 无效的 morphing：splitted path 不匹配

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: `fontSize` is required to be a number.
ast.target: MUI: `fontSize` 必须是数字。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: `htmlFontSize` is required to be a number.
ast.target: MUI: `htmlFontSize` 必须是数字。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: Argument "props" must be a string or Array.
ast.target: MUI: 参数 "props" 必须是字符串或数组。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: Argument "easing" must be a string.
ast.target: MUI: 参数 "easing" 必须是字符串。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: Argument "delay" must be a number or a string.
ast.target: MUI: 参数 "delay" 必须是数字或字符串。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: You need to provide a `anchorPosition` prop when using <Popover anchorReference="anchorPosition" />.
ast.target: MUI: 使用 <Popover anchorReference="anchorPosition" /> 时，需要提供 `anchorPosition` 属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: `children` must be passed when using the `TextField` component with `select`.
ast.target: MUI: 使用带 `select` 的 `TextField` 组件时，必须传入 `children`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: [Vault Size History] Error while processing creation date property of the file
ast.target: [Vault Size History] 处理文件创建日期属性时出错

ast.name: log
ast.source: Accounting for deleted files
ast.target: 正在统计已删除的文件

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Duplicate headers found and renamed.
ast.target: 发现重复的标题并已重命名。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: z / z2 / zlevel of displayable is invalid, which may cause unexpected errors
ast.target: displayable 的 z / z2 / zlevel 无效，可能导致意外错误

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Currently only one tooltip component is allowed.
ast.target: 当前只允许一个 tooltip 组件。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: There is no specified series model
ast.target: 未指定 series model

ast.name: warn
ast.source: model or view can not be found by params
ast.target: 无法通过 params 找到 model 或 view

ast.name: warn
ast.source: There is a chart instance already initialized on the dom.
ast.target: dom 上已初始化一个 chart 实例。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Can't get DOM width or height. Please check dom.clientWidth and dom.clientHeight. They should not be 0.For example, you may need to call this in the callback of window.onload.
ast.target: 无法获取 DOM 的宽度或高度。请检查 dom.clientWidth 和 dom.clientHeight。它们不应为 0。例如，你可能需要在 window.onload 的回调中调用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Exceed safe limit.
ast.target: 超出安全限制。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Boolean type for boundaryGap is only allowed for ordinal axis. Please use string in percentage instead, e.g., "20%". Currently, boundaryGap is set to be 0.
ast.target: boundaryGap 仅允许在 ordinal axis 上使用布尔类型。请改用百分比字符串，例如 "20%"。当前 boundaryGap 被设置为 0。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Visual map on line style is only supported on cartesian2d.
ast.target: line style 上的 visual map 仅支持 cartesian2d。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Visual map on line style only support x or y dimension.
ast.target: line style 上的 visual map 仅支持 x 或 y 维度。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Only cartesian2d and polar supported for bar.
ast.target: 柱状图仅支持 cartesian2d 和 polar。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `realtimeSort` will not work because this bar series is not based on a category axis.
ast.target: `realtimeSort` 将无法工作，因为此柱状图系列不是基于类目轴。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `realtimeSort` will not work because this bar series is not on cartesian2d.
ast.target: `realtimeSort` 将无法工作，因为此柱状图系列不在 cartesian2d 上。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: project and unproject must be both provided in the projeciton.
ast.target: project 和 unproject 必须同时在 projeciton 中提供。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Given layoutCenter or layoutSize data are invalid. Use left/top/width/height instead.
ast.target: 给定的 layoutCenter 或 layoutSize 数据无效。请使用 left/top/width/height。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Position error: Funnel chart on vertical orient dose not support top and bottom.
ast.target: 位置错误：垂直方向的漏斗图不支持 top 和 bottom。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Position error: Funnel chart on horizontal orient dose not support left and right.
ast.target: 位置错误：水平方向的漏斗图不支持 left 和 right。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: SVG render mode doesn't support lines with trail effect
ast.target: SVG 渲染模式不支持带尾迹效果的线条。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Large lines not support effect
ast.target: 大数据量线条不支持效果。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Lines data configuration has been changed to { coords:[[1,2],[2,3]] }
ast.target: Lines 数据配置已更改为 { coords:[[1,2],[2,3]] }

ast.name: warn
ast.source: End frame with percent: 1 is missing in the keyframeAnimation.
ast.target: 关键帧动画中缺少百分比为 1 的结束帧。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Universal transition is disabled on large data > 10k.
ast.target: 大数据量 > 10k 时通用过渡被禁用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: MUI: You can not use the `minRows` or `maxRows` props when the input `rows` prop is set.
ast.target: MUI：当设置了输入的 `rows` 属性时，不能使用 `minRows` 或 `maxRows` 属性。
